/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/MISDRED1:002/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVSCONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/ARBUCKLE/REMA/DEFT ADV NL:002/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/X:SENTENCING IS DEFERRED FOR A PERIOD OF ONE YEAR IN ORDER FOR DEFENDANT TO OBTAIN NO NEW CHARGES, COMPLETE 40 HOURS OF COMMUNITYSERVICE, MAKE A GOOD EFFORT TO PAY RESTITUTION, AND MAINTAIN OR ACTIVELY SEEK EMPLOYMENT OR SCHOOLING, IF DEFENDANT SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETES  THESE TERMS, THE PLEA SHALL BE WITHDRAWN AND THE PROPOSED COUNT AND SENTENCE IS  TOBE DISMISSED/TWS/CONTD:STATUS OF DEJ/DOP/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/X:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT IS DISCHARGED/X:DEFENDANT AGREES TO ENTER INTO INFORMAL DIVERSION/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO FOLLOWCONDITIONS OF INFORMAL DIVERSION/X:PART OF THE NEGOTIATED INFORMAL DIVERSION IS DEFENDANT WILL NOT ENTER PLEA FOR ONE YEAR/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO PICKUP NO NEW CHARGES THAT LEAD TO THE FILING OF A COMPLAINT IN ANY JURISDICTION/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO BE EMPLOYED OR ACTIVELY SEEKING EMPLOYMENT OR ENROLLED IN AN ACCREDITED EDUCATIONAL PROGRAM/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO COMPLETE 20 HOURS OF COMMUNITY SERVICE/STWPX/EMTERM/OR/X:THE COURT VACATES THE FUTURE DATE OF 02-11-21 IN M09/CONTD:INFORMAL DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/DOPU:POSITIVE REPORT/

CONTD PROC RE BW;/X:BY WAIVER OF CONDUCT, COURT STIP LD: 03-08-21 (60TH)/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND  STAYED TO 02-11-21/X: BAIL SET AT $50,000/CONTD: STAY BW FTA 02-04-21 $15K & TO SET/DOP/

/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN FTA ARRAIGNMENT/BWDNC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S)& DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:02-23-21 (30TH)/X:THE 60TH LAST DAY IS 03-08-21/987,2/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICEAND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA2:GUITAR CENTERAT 1645 VAN NESS AVE, SF/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING AND POSSIBLE E,M, REMOVAL UPON POSITIVE ACM REPORT/DOP/X:EST 1 HR/
